reviews.review_description: Moderates are really  nice I am a Moderate  myself  please  like this game don't  be toxic  or a admin  will ban you bye also  this is the best gorilla  tag fan game

I just got this game today and a trusted person come on kept on saying I was flying, but I wasn’t. I just had speed boost and I wasn’t a casual and he he didn’t even report me and now I can’t even like join any codes my cosmetics won’t work that’s a one star. ￼
